title: cytisus hirsutus subsp. leiocarpus
intro: Cytisus hirsutus subsp. leiocarpus, also known as the hairy broom or French broom, is a plant species in the genus Cytisus and is part of the pea family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cytisus hirsutus subsp. leiocarpus include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
